response.justification: Strong generalist with 10+ years of full-stack experience and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq, which aligns with the role's keystone technologies. However, the resume shows no substantive history shipping production GenAI systems, no demonstrated work with vector databases or RAG architectures, and no evidence of leading customer-facing technical discovery — all core requirements for a Staff Forward Deployed GenAI role.
strengths: Recent hands-on work with MCP code generators and agentic workflow tooling at re:cinq
Deep polyglot engineering background (TypeScript, Node, Python-adjacent ecosystems) with cloud and microservices experience
Demonstrated technical leadership through workshops, courses, and open-source platform ownership (GISCollective)
concerns: No clear 8+ years building production AI/GenAI solutions — AI work appears to be recent (2025+)
No explicit experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, or LLM evaluation/observability pipelines
No evidence of customer-facing forward-deployed or consulting engagements with enterprise stakeholders

key_factors.factor: Lacks 8+ years of production AI experience
Missing RAG and vector database experience
Recent MCP and agentic workflow work
